home.heroSubtitle: Bonjour Bébé brings the art of infant massage to the Greater Seattle Area. Nurturing confidence and calm for you and your little one.
home.founderBio1: Originally from France, I lived in Southeast Asia for 10 years, including Singapore, before my family moved to the US in 2024. Now based in Bellevue, WA, I am a Certified Educator of Infant Massage, dedicated to empowering new parents.
home.founderBio2: My philosophy blends the gentle, time-honored traditions of French childcare with modern, evidence-based practices. Together, we create a sanctuary of calm for you and your bébé.
home.benefitBondingDesc: Strengthen the emotional connection through the language of touch, releasing oxytocin for both parent and baby.
home.benefitReliefDesc: Alleviate common discomforts like gas, colic, and teething pain while promoting better sleep patterns.
home.benefitConfidenceDesc: Learn to read your baby's cues effectively, feeling more empowered and capable in your parenting journey.
home.servicesSubtitle: Offering private sessions, group workshops, and prenatal consultations tailored to your needs.
home.locationDesc: Based in Bellevue, WA, offering classes and travel-to-home appointments across the Greater Seattle Area.

about.title: My Story
about.subtitle: French softness meets Pacific Northwest serenity.
about.bio1: I am Marion Malbec, a mom of two young boys and a Certified Educator of Infant Massage (CEIM). Originally from France, I lived in Southeast Asia for 10 years, including Singapore, before my family moved to the US in 2024.
about.bio2: My infant massage journey began in 2019, when I learned to massage my eldest son. What started as a beautiful bonding moment quickly became a passion! After taking IAIM classes, I knew I wanted to learn more and eventually became a CEIM so I could share this practice with other families.
about.bio3: I put my career as an architect on pause to follow my heart and launch <italic>Bonjour Bébé</italic>. It's an exciting and meaningful step, allowing me to build a community in this new chapter of life. I believe touch is our first language, and my mission is to give you the tools to speak it fluently, with confidence and joy.
about.credential1: Certified Educator of Infant Massage (CEIM) by the International Association of Infant Massage (IAIM) and Infant Massage USA (IMUSA).
about.credential2: Trained in pediatric First Aid & CPR.
about.philosophyQuote: "We do not massage the baby; we massage <bold>with</bold> the baby."
about.philosophyDesc: My approach is strictly baby-led. We listen to cues, respect boundaries, and ensure the experience is pleasurable for both of you. It is not about technique perfection, but connection depth.

services.title: Our Offerings
services.subtitle: Thoughtfully designed experiences to nurture the bond between you and your little one.
services.travelDesc: For your ultimate comfort, I can bring the session to your living room.
services.travelNote: Available in the Bellevue and Greater Seattle Area. Additional travel fee of $30 applies.
services.faq1a: We use high-quality, organic, cold-pressed vegetable oils (like sunflower or grapeseed) that are safe and edible for baby.
services.faq2q: When is the best age to start?
services.faq2a: You can start as early as birth! However, for classes, we recommend babies be between 4 weeks and 12 months old.
services.faq3a: Oui! Infant massage classes make a perfect baby shower gift. Contact us to purchase.
services.faq4q: What if my baby cries during class?
services.faq4a: Crying is welcome. It is their way of communicating. Our classes are baby-led, so you can stop, feed, or cuddle anytime.

serviceItems.privateDesc: One-on-one personalized instruction in the comfort of your home or my studio. Tailored to your baby's specific needs.
serviceItems.workshopDesc: Learn the art of infant massage alongside other parents. A wonderful way to socialize and learn.
serviceItems.prenatalDesc: Prepare for your baby's arrival by learning the basics of nurturing touch and bonding before birth.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Ready to start your infant massage journey? Send me a message or book a session.
contact.infoSubtitle: Je suis là pour vous aider. I'm here to support you and your bébé.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your baby and any questions you have...

footer.tagline: Nurturing touch, French calm, and deep connection. Supporting Bellevue and Greater Seattle families in their early parenting journey with gentleness and expertise.
footer.madeWith: Created with love for Bellevue & Seattle families.
